caption: A woman with shoulder-length dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain dark background. She wears a light green tunic with floral embroidery along the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to her clothing. In the lower corners of the frames, a circular logo appears next to the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman is seen speaking and gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. Her right hand moves from her chest outward, and she opens and closes her fingers while speaking. Her facial expressions shift as she articulates her words, and her head tilts slightly as she continues to communicate. The camera angle remains a steady medium shot, focusing on her upper body throughout the clip.
